title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!
